_meta.description: Durable, human-owned ledger of filer->voter match confirmations. This file is the SOURCE OF TRUTH for verification and is NEVER regenerated by the pipeline. match_to_voters.py JOINS it into serve/partisan_profiles.json as a read-only `verification` projection; do not hand-edit the projection (a rebuild wipes it) -- edit here. Git history is the audit log; sign ledger commits.

states.unverified: default when no entry exists for a match_key
states.confirmed: a human verified this filer IS this sos_voterid; stays `current` until the bound voter record changes (binding_hash), then auto-flags `stale`
states.rejected: a human verified this match is WRONG; the profile keeps the auto-match but is flagged needs_review
states.corrected: a human supplied the right voter; set corrected_sos_voterid and the build re-points the profile to it

entry_shape.sos_voterid: the voterid this confirmation pertains to (the auto-matched id)
entry_shape.corrected_sos_voterid: for state=corrected: the right voterid (else null)
entry_shape.verified_by: confirmer identity (ties to ROSTER_TOKEN auth later)
entry_shape.binding_hash: match_to_voters.binding_hash of the voter at confirmation time
